name: Graphqelm.Http

values.name: buildMutationRequest
values.type: String -> SelectionSet decodesTo RootMutation -> Request decodesTo

values.name: buildQueryRequest
values.type: String -> SelectionSet decodesTo RootQuery -> Request decodesTo

values.name: send
values.type: (Result Error a -> msg) -> Request a -> Cmd msg

values.name: toRequest
values.comment:
Convert to a `Graphqelm.Http.Request` to an `Http.Request`.
Useful for using libraries like
[RemoteData](http://package.elm-lang.org/packages/krisajenkins/remotedata/latest/).

    makeRequest : Cmd Msg
    makeRequest =
        query
            |> Graphqelm.Http.buildQueryRequest "http://localhost:4000/api"
            |> Graphqelm.Http.toRequest
            |> RemoteData.sendRequest
            |> Cmd.map GotResponse

values.name: withHeader
values.type: String -> String -> Request decodesTo -> Request decodesTo

name: Graphqelm.Document
comment:
You'll usually want to use `Graphqelm.Http` to perform your queries directly.
This package provides low-level functions for generating GraphQL documents that
are helpful for debugging and demo purposes.

@docs serializeQuery, serializeMutation

values.name: serializeMutation
values.comment: Serialize a mutation selection set into a string for a GraphQL endpoint.

values.name: serializeQuery
values.comment: Serialize a query selection set into a string for a GraphQL endpoint.

name: Graphqelm.Builder.Object
comment:
Internal functions for use by auto-generated code from the `graphqelm` CLI.
@docs fieldDecoder, listOf, object, single

values.name: fieldDecoder
values.comment: Refer to a field in auto-generated code.
values.type: String -> List Argument -> Decoder decodesTo -> FieldDecoder decodesTo lockedTo

values.name: listOf
values.comment: Refer to list of objects in auto-generated code.
values.type: String -> List Argument -> SelectionSet a objectTypeLock -> FieldDecoder (List a) lockedTo

values.name: object
values.comment: Used to create the `selection` functions in auto-generated code.

values.name: single
values.comment: Refer to single object in auto-generated code.
values.type: String -> List Argument -> SelectionSet a objectTypeLock -> FieldDecoder a lockedTo

name: Graphqelm.SelectionSet
comment:
The auto-generated code from the `graphqelm` CLI will provide `selection`
functions for Objects in your GraphQL schema. These functions take a `Graphqelm.SelectionSet`
which describes which fields to retrieve on that SelectionSet.
@docs SelectionSet, with

values.name: with
values.comment:
Used to pick out fields on an object.

    import Api.Enum.Episode as Episode exposing (Episode)
    import Api.Object
    import Graphqelm.SelectionSet exposing (SelectionSet, with)

    type alias Hero =
        { name : String
        , id : String
        , appearsIn : List Episode
        }

    hero : SelectionSet Hero Api.Object.Character
    hero =
        Character.selection Hero
            |> with Character.name
            |> with Character.id
            |> with Character.appearsIn
values.type: FieldDecoder a typeLock -> SelectionSet (a -> b) typeLock -> SelectionSet b typeLock

name: Graphqelm.FieldDecoder

values.name: map
values.comment:
Maps the data coming back from the GraphQL endpoint. In this example,
`User.name` is a module that the `graphqelm` CLI tool created which tells us
that the `name` field on a `User` object is a String according to your GraphQL
schema.

    import Api.Object
    import Api.Object.User as User
    import Graphqelm.FieldDecoder as FieldDecoder
    import Graphqelm.SelectionSet exposing (SelectionSet, with)

    human : SelectionSet String Api.Object.User
    human =
        User.selection identity
            |> with
                (User.name
                    |> FieldDecoder.map String.toUpper
                )
values.type: (decodesTo -> mapsTo) -> FieldDecoder decodesTo typeLock -> FieldDecoder mapsTo typeLock

name: Graphqelm.Builder.Argument
comment:
Internal functions for use by auto-generated code from the `graphqelm` CLI.
@docs Argument, enum, int, optional, string

values.name: optional
values.comment: Used for passing optional arguments in generated code.
values.type: String -> Maybe a -> (a -> Value) -> Maybe Argument

name: Graphqelm.Encode

values.name: enum
values.comment: Encode an enum. The first argument is the toString function for that enum.

values.name: object
values.comment: Encode a list of key-value pairs into an object

unions.name: RootMutation
unions.comment:
Type for top-level mutations which can be sent using functions
from `Graphqelm.Http`.

unions.name: RootQuery
unions.comment:
Type for top-level queries which can be sent using functions
from `Graphqelm.Http`.
